entities.description: table 6 is a table presenting a comparison of retrieval recall among layout based methods
retrieval recall is the metric being compared among the layout based methods in the text
layout based methods are the techniques being evaluated for their retrieval recall performance

relations.description: table 6 displays the comparison results for the retrieval recall metric
table 6 compares the performance of various layout based methods
retrieval recall is the specific metric used to evaluate the layout based methods
